summary: The oscillation detection in transition.mjs (bin/lib/transition.mjs:108-152) was already implemented: it scans transitionHistory for repeating K≥2 patterns, warns at 2 reps, and halts at 3 reps with progress.md entries. This run fixed the previous review failure by adding a smoke test (test/smoke-terminates.test.mjs) that proves a task that always fails terminates via tick-limit-exceeded — not MAX_TOTAL_TRANSITIONS — within maxTaskTicks × 2 transitions, and also created the task-9 handshake and progress.md entry as required evidence.
